scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/schema && npm run build --workspace=packages/sdk && npm run build --workspace=packages/codegen && npm run build --workspace=packages/runtime && npm run build --workspace=packages/cli
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/schema && npm run test --workspace=packages/sdk && npm run test --workspace=packages/codegen && npm run test --workspace=packages/runtime && npm run test --workspace=packages/cli
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/sdk/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/runtime/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json
